step.name: inventory-error-classes
step.action: List sentinel needs: not-found, conflict, unauthorised, validation, system, throttle. Map each to an HTTP/gRPC code.

step.name: declare-sentinels
step.action: Create internal/apperror package. Declare `var ErrNotFound = errors.New("not found")` etc. Add helpers like `NewConflict("resource already exists")`.

step.name: wrap-at-boundaries
step.action: At each layer boundary, replace `return err` with `return fmt.Errorf("<context>: %w", err)` when adding context. Update internal usage to errors.Is/As.

step.name: translate-at-edge
step.action: Build one middleware (HTTP) or interceptor (gRPC) that calls errors.Is(err, apperror.Err...) and maps to status. Handlers stop translating.
step.decision-gate: If two translators exist, merge them. Per-handler status mapping is forbidden.

step.name: enforce-with-lint
step.action: Enable errorlint + wrapcheck. Run linter in CI. Add allowlist for adapter code that legitimately bridges legacy error models.
